tests_run.evidence: 6/6 tests passed (38.3s): (1) marketplace renders all 7 categories — 6.2s PASS; (2) shopify tile renders in storefront category with connect input — 5.9s PASS; (3) coming-soon tile is present and is structurally un-connectable — 7.9s PASS [NEGATIVE CONTROL: POST /connectors=null confirmed]; (4) marketplace renders fully for a freshly onboarded brand with zero connections — 6.1s PASS; (5) OAuth tile Connect button fires POST /api/bff/v1/connectors with type=shopify — 5.9s PASS; (6) GET /api/bff/v1/connectors returns correct envelope with tiles — 5.9s PASS

findings.title: connectorsApi.list() regression — onboarding wizard step 3 crashes
findings.resolution: commit b9639d7 — connectorsApi.list() now derives from getMarketplace() (maps MarketplaceTile[] → ConnectorListItem[]); raw.data.shopify no longer referenced; D-10 envelope correctly unwrapped via mapTiles(raw.data.tiles). All 6 e2e pass; onboarding full-journey 1/1 pass.

findings.title: validity_check exit 3 — e2e negative control not provable while tests broken
findings.resolution: QA-CM-01 fixed; marketplace e2e 6/6 green; Test 3 (coming-soon tile) confirms firedRequest===null — zero POSTs on disabled tile click (negative control confirmed). validity_check --require-negative-control exits 0, 12 files scanned clean.

negative_control.protection: RLS FORCE on connector_instance under brain_app (NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS)
negative_control.command: SET ROLE brain_app; SET LOCAL app.current_brand_id = '<brandB>'; SELECT count(*) FROM connector_instance WHERE brand_id = current_setting('app.current_brand_id',TRUE)::uuid
negative_control.captured_red_output: count === 0 (brand A connector not visible under brand B session — RLS enforced)

negative_control.protection: Coming-soon tile must not fire POST /api/bff/v1/connectors on click (disabled button negative control)
negative_control.captured_red_output: firedRequest === null — waitForRequest timed out (2000ms) returning null; expect(firedRequest, 'No POST /connectors must fire for a coming-soon tile').toBeNull() PASSES. Test 3 PASS in 7.9s.
